description: Format the book chapter manuscript '/home/ga/Documents/chapter1_draft.docx' (Pride and Prejudice, Chapter I) with professional page styles. Apply mirror margins (Inside 1.25", Outside 1.0", Top 1.0", Bottom 1.0"). Configure the document with a different first page and different odd/even pages. The first page should have an empty header and a centered page number in the footer. Even page headers must contain 'Pride and Prejudice' aligned left, and odd page headers must contain 'Chapter I' aligned right. Apply the Heading 1 style to the centered chapter title 'Chapter I'. Set all body text to 12pt Serif font with double spacing (2.0). Save the result as a new file at '/home/ga/Documents/chapter1_formatted.docx' without overwriting the original.

metadata.required_text_content: It is a truth universally acknowledged
